---
title: "BreakNBuild"
description: "Evaluate model performance with progressively sampled data. Helps assess how models behave as training data grows."
image: ../../img/packages/breaknbuild.png
order: 1
categories: [modeling, tidymodels]
href: https://focardozom.github.io/BreakNBuild/
---

[Visit website →](https://focardozom.github.io/BreakNBuild/){.pkg-link target="_blank"}
